message:
test(harness,demo-showcase,layout): update test infrastructure for determinism and tracing fixes

- golden_checksums, golden_trace_corpus: call enable_deterministic_mode_for_test
  on all AppModel instances to ensure reproducible VFX/VoI overlay timing
- layout_composer_ux_a11y: reduce tiny terminal height threshold from 5 to 3
  to match actual too-small detection boundary
- e2e_flicker_free_round_trip, golden_frame_e2e, regression_detection_accuracy,
  slo_schema_breach_detection: add ensure_global_trace_level() and
  rebuild_interest_cache() to fix tracing span capture in multi-test runs
- Regenerate 5 VFX golden checksum files (metaballs checksums changed due
  to theme color adjustments)
- Add overflow_bug.rs regression test for grid gap overflow clamping

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
